sEn: Ovis2.5 achieves SOTA among sub-40B open-source MLLMs with native-resolution visual perception and reflection-based reasoning.
sZh: Ovis2.5通过原生分辨率视觉感知和反思推理，在40B以下开源多模态大模型中达到SOTA。
absEn: We present Ovis2.5, a successor to Ovis2 designed for native-resolution visual perception and strong multimodal reasoning. Ovis2.5 integrates a native-resolution vision transformer that processes images at their native, variable resolutions, avoiding the degradation from fixed-resolution tiling and preserving both fine detail and global layout -- crucial for visually dense content like complex charts. To strengthen reasoning, we train the model to move beyond linear chain-of-thought and perform reflection -- including self-checking and revision. This advanced capability is exposed as an optional "thinking mode" at inference time, allowing users to trade latency for enhanced accuracy on difficult inputs. The model is trained via a comprehensive five-phase curriculum that progressively builds its skills. The process begins with foundational visual and multimodal pretraining, advances through large-scale instruction tuning, and culminates in alignment and reasoning enhancement using DPO and GRPO. To scale these upgrades efficiently, we employ multimodal data packing and hybrid parallelism, yielding a significant end-to-end speedup. We release two open-source models: Ovis2.5-9B and Ovis2.5-2B. The latter continues the "small model, big performance" philosophy of Ovis2, making it ideal for resource-constrained, on-device scenarios. On the OpenCompass multimodal leaderboard, Ovis2.5-9B averages 78.3, marking a substantial improvement over its predecessor, Ovis2-8B, and achieving state-of-the-art results among open-source MLLMs in the sub-40B parameter range; Ovis2.5-2B scores 73.9, establishing SOTA for its size. Beyond aggregate scores, Ovis2.5 achieves leading results on STEM benchmarks, exhibits strong capabilities on grounding and video tasks, and achieves open-source SOTA at its scale for complex chart analysis.
absZh: 我们提出Ovis2.5，它是Ovis2的升级版，专为原生分辨率视觉感知和强大多模态推理而设计。Ovis2.5集成了一个原生分辨率视觉变换器，以图像原始的可变分辨率进行处理，避免了固定分辨率分块带来的质量下降，同时保留了精细细节和全局布局——这对于复杂图表等视觉密集内容至关重要。为了增强推理能力，我们训练模型超越线性思维链，进行反思——包括自我检查和修正。这一高级能力在推理时作为可选的“思考模式”暴露，允许用户在困难输入上以延迟换取更高准确性。该模型通过一个全面的五阶段课程进行训练，逐步构建其技能。过程从基础视觉和多模态预训练开始，经过大规模指令微调，最终使用DPO和GRPO进行对齐和推理增强。为了高效扩展这些升级，我们采用了多模态数据打包和混合并行，实现了显著的端到端加速。我们发布两个开源模型：Ovis2.5-9B和Ovis2.5-2B。后者延续了Ovis2的“小模型，大性能”理念，非常适合资源受限的设备端场景。在OpenCompass多模态排行榜上，Ovis2.5-9B平均得分为78.3，相比前代Ovis2-8B有显著提升，并在40B以下参数范围的开源多模态大语言模型中达到最先进水平；Ovis2.5-2B得分为73.9，在其规模上确立了SOTA。除了总分，Ovis2.5在STEM基准测试中取得领先结果，在定位和视频任务上表现出色，并在复杂图表分析上达到其规模的开源SOTA。

contrib.en: Integrates a native-resolution vision transformer (NaViT) to process images at variable native resolutions, avoiding fixed-resolution tiling and preserving fine details and global layout.
contrib.zh: 集成原生分辨率视觉Transformer（NaViT），以可变原生分辨率处理图像，避免固定分辨率分块，保留细节和全局布局。

contrib.en: Introduces an optional 'thinking mode' at inference time, enabling reflection, self-checking, and revision for deeper reasoning beyond linear chain-of-thought.
contrib.zh: 在推理时引入可选的“思考模式”，支持反思、自我检查和修正，实现超越线性思维链的深度推理。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art results on OpenCompass multimodal leaderboard among open-source MLLMs under 40B parameters, with Ovis2.5-9B scoring 78.3.
contrib.zh: 在OpenCompass多模态排行榜上，Ovis2.5-9B以78.3分在40B参数以下开源MLLM中取得最优结果。

contrib.en: Delivers leading performance on STEM, chart analysis, visual grounding, and video benchmarks, including open-source SOTA on complex chart analysis.
contrib.zh: 在STEM、图表分析、视觉定位和视频基准上取得领先性能，包括复杂图表分析的开源最优。

contrib.en: Employs a five-phase curriculum training pipeline with multimodal data packing and hybrid parallelism, achieving 3-4x end-to-end speedup.
contrib.zh: 采用五阶段课程训练流程，结合多模态数据打包和混合并行，实现3-4倍端到端加速。

contrib.en: Releases two open-source models, Ovis2.5-9B and Ovis2.5-2B, with the latter achieving SOTA for its size on OpenCompass (73.9).
contrib.zh: 发布两个开源模型Ovis2.5-9B和Ovis2.5-2B，后者在OpenCompass上以73.9分取得同尺寸最优。

limits.en: Scaling perception to 4K-level high-resolution images while maintaining accuracy remains an open challenge.
limits.zh: 将感知扩展到4K级高分辨率图像同时保持准确性仍是一个开放挑战。

limits.en: Handling long-input video with richer temporal reasoning is not fully addressed.
limits.zh: 处理长输入视频并实现更丰富的时间推理尚未完全解决。

limits.en: Tighter integration of tool use for action-augmented reasoning is left for future work.
limits.zh: 更紧密地集成工具使用以增强行动推理留待未来工作。

limits.en: The 'thinking mode' trades latency for accuracy, which may not suit latency-sensitive applications.
limits.zh: “思考模式”以延迟换取准确性，可能不适合对延迟敏感的应用。

limits.en: Evaluation is limited to benchmarks; real-world deployment performance may vary.
limits.zh: 评估限于基准测试；实际部署性能可能有所不同。

items.en: We present Ovis2.5, a successor to Ovis2 designed for native-resolution visual perception and strong multimodal reasoning. Ovis2.5 integrates a native-resolution vision transformer that processes images at their native, variable resolutions, avoiding the degradation from fixed-resolution tiling and preserving both fine detail and global layout—crucial for visually dense content like complex charts. To strengthen reasoning, we train the model to move beyond linear chain-of-thought and perform reflection—including self-checking and revision. This advanced capability is exposed as an optional “thinking mode” at inference time, allowing users to trade latency for enhanced accuracy on difficult inputs. The model is trained via a comprehensive five-phase curriculum that progressively builds its skills. The process begins with foundational visual and multimodal pretraining, advances through large-scale instruction tuning, and culminates in alignment and reasoning enhancement using DPO and GRPO. To scale these upgrades efficiently, we employ multimodal data packing and hybrid parallelism, yielding a significant end-to-end speedup. We release two open-source models: Ovis2.5-9B and Ovis2.5-2B. The latter continues the “small model, big performance” philosophy of Ovis2, making it ideal for resource-constrained, on-device scenarios. On the OpenCompass multimodal leaderboard, Ovis2.5-9B averages 78.3, marking a substantial improvement over its predecessor, Ovis2-8B, and achieving state-of-the-art results among open-source MLLMs in the sub-40B parameter range; Ovis2.5-2B scores 73.9, establishing SOTA for its size. Beyond aggregate scores, Ovis2.5 achieves leading results on STEM benchmarks, exhibits strong capabilities on grounding and video tasks, and achieves open-source SOTA at its scale for complex chart analysis.
items.zh: 我们提出Ovis2.5，它是Ovis2的后续版本，专为原生分辨率视觉感知和强大多模态推理而设计。Ovis2.5集成了一个原生分辨率视觉Transformer，能够以图像的原生可变分辨率进行处理，避免了固定分辨率分块带来的退化，同时保留了精细细节和全局布局——这对于复杂图表等视觉密集内容至关重要。为了加强推理，我们训练模型超越线性思维链，执行反思——包括自我检查和修正。这种高级能力在推理时作为可选的“思考模式”提供，允许用户以延迟换取对困难输入的更高准确性。该模型通过一个全面的五阶段课程进行训练，逐步构建其技能。该过程从基础的视觉和多模态预训练开始，经过大规模指令微调，最后使用DPO和GRPO进行对齐和推理增强。为了高效扩展这些升级，我们采用了多模态数据打包和混合并行，实现了显著的端到端加速。我们发布两个开源模型：Ovis2.5-9B和Ovis2.5-2B。后者延续了Ovis2的“小模型，大性能”理念，非常适合资源受限的端侧场景。在OpenCompass多模态排行榜上，Ovis2.5-9B平均得分为78.3，相比其前身Ovis2-8B有显著提升，并在40B参数以下的开源MLLM中取得了最先进的结果；Ovis2.5-2B得分为73.9，在其规模上建立了SOTA。除了总分，Ovis2.5在STEM基准测试上取得了领先结果，在定位和视频任务上表现出色，并在其规模的复杂图表分析中达到了开源SOTA。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Benchmark performance of Ovis2.5 and its counterparts.
items.capZh: 图1：Ovis2.5及其对应模型的基准性能。

items.en: The field of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) has seen rapid advancements, with a surge of powerful open-source models demonstrating remarkable capabilities (Liu et al., 2024a; Bai et al., 2025; Zhu et al., 2025; Hong et al., 2025; Yang et al., 2025b; Yue et al., 2025). Many of these models are built upon a conventional architecture, typically connecting a pre-trained vision transformer (ViT) and a large language model (LLM) via a simple projector like an MLP. In our previous work (Lu et al., 2024b), we identified a misalignment between the continuous structure of the visual embeddings from the MLP projector and the discrete structure of the textual embeddings. We proposed the Ovis architecture to structurally align the textual and visual embeddings using a learnable visual embedding table, and empirically validated its superiority over conventional designs.
items.zh: 多模态大语言模型（MLLM）领域取得了快速进展，涌现出大量功能强大的开源模型（Liu等人，2024a；Bai等人，2025；Zhu等人，2025；Hong等人，2025；Yang等人，2025b；Yue等人，2025）。许多这些模型基于传统架构，通常通过简单的投影器（如MLP）连接预训练的视觉Transformer（ViT）和大语言模型（LLM）。在我们之前的工作中（Lu等人，2024b），我们发现了MLP投影器产生的视觉嵌入的连续结构与文本嵌入的离散结构之间的错位。我们提出了Ovis架构，使用可学习的视觉嵌入表在结构上对齐文本和视觉嵌入，并通过实验验证了其相对于传统设计的优越性。

items.en: Building on this foundation, we have iteratively developed the Ovis series, releasing versions 1.5, 1.6, and 2.0. These updates progressively enhanced the model’s capabilities to handle high-resolution images, multi-image and video inputs, OCR tasks, multilingual scenarios, and complex problems like mathematical reasoning. Each version demonstrated leading performance among open-source models of a similar scale upon its release. However, despite these significant improvements, we observed that even our latest model, Ovis2, still struggled with tasks requiring deep reasoning or detailed analysis of visually dense content, such as complex charts. These shortcomings stem from two core issues: (1) rigid vision front-ends—e.g., fixed-resolution encoders that necessitate image tiling and compromise global structure; and (2) training schemes that emphasize linear chain-of-thought (CoT) but lack reflective, self-corrective supervision, limiting deeper reasoning.
items.zh: 在此基础之上，我们迭代开发了Ovis系列，发布了1.5、1.6和2.0版本。这些更新逐步增强了模型处理高分辨率图像、多图像和视频输入、OCR任务、多语言场景以及复杂问题（如数学推理）的能力。每个版本在发布时都展示了同类开源模型中的领先性能。然而，尽管取得了这些显著改进，我们观察到即使是最新模型Ovis2，在处理需要深度推理或对视觉密集内容（如复杂图表）进行详细分析的任务时仍然存在困难。这些缺陷源于两个核心问题：（1）僵化的视觉前端——例如固定分辨率编码器需要图像分块，损害了全局结构；（2）训练方案强调线性思维链（CoT），但缺乏反思性、自我修正的监督，限制了更深层次的推理。

items.en: To address these issues, we present Ovis2.5, which introduces two key improvements: First, to enhance its perceptual abilities, we replace the fixed-resolution ViT with the native-resolution ViT (NaViT, Dehghani et al., 2023). NaViT processes images at their native, variable resolutions, avoiding lossy tiling and preserving both fine-grained details and global layout that are critical for charts, diagrams, and other visually dense content. Second, to strengthen its reasoning abilities, we augment training with deep-reasoning data that supervises not only linear CoT but also reflective processes such as self-checking and revision. This teaches the model to produce intermediate steps to evaluate its own reasoning, and refine conclusions when necessary, enabling deeper and more robust reasoning. The deep-reasoning capability is available as an optional “thinking mode” at inference time. This allows users to keep the mode off for efficiency on easy inputs, or enable it for complex problems to trade latency for higher accuracy.
items.zh: 为了解决这些问题，我们提出了Ovis2.5，引入了两项关键改进：首先，为了增强感知能力，我们将固定分辨率ViT替换为原生分辨率ViT（NaViT，Dehghani等人，2023）。NaViT以图像的原生可变分辨率进行处理，避免了有损分块，保留了图表、示意图和其他视觉密集内容至关重要的精细细节和全局布局。其次，为了加强推理能力，我们使用深度推理数据增强训练，不仅监督线性CoT，还监督反思过程，如自我检查和修正。这教会模型产生中间步骤来评估自己的推理，并在必要时完善结论，从而实现更深层、更稳健的推理。深度推理能力在推理时作为可选的“思考模式”提供。这使得用户可以在简单输入上关闭该模式以提高效率，或在复杂问题上启用它以延迟换取更高准确性。

items.en: In alignment with these upgrades, we also refined our training strategy into a comprehensive five-phase curriculum—(i) visual pretraining, (ii) multimodal pretraining, (iii) instruction tuning, (iv) DPO (Rafailov et al., 2023), and (v) reinforcement learning (GRPO, Shao et al., 2024)—which progressively builds the model from foundational perception to advanced reasoning. To scale this ambitious training, we developed a high-efficiency infrastructure that leverages multimodal data packing and hybrid parallelism, delivering a 33–4×4\times end-to-end speedup.
items.zh: 与这些升级一致，我们还优化了训练策略，形成全面的五阶段课程——（i）视觉预训练，（ii）多模态预训练，（iii）指令微调，（iv）DPO（Rafailov等人，2023），以及（v）强化学习（GRPO，Shao等人，2024）——逐步将模型从基础感知构建到高级推理。为了扩展这一雄心勃勃的训练，我们开发了高效的基础设施，利用多模态数据打包和混合并行，实现了33–4倍的端到端加速。

items.en: Comprehensive evaluations demonstrate the exceptional capabilities of Ovis2.5. On the OpenCompass multimodal leaderboard (Duan et al., 2025), Ovis2.5-9B achieves an average score of 78.378.3, indicating strong overall multimodal performance. This result not only represents a substantial improvement over its predecessor, Ovis2-8B, but also establishes a new state-of-the-art among open-source MLLMs in the sub-40B parameter range. In line with Ovis2’s “small model, big performance” philosophy—particularly for on-device applications—we also release Ovis2.5-2B, which scores 73.973.9 on OpenCompass, a state-of-the-art result among open-source MLLMs of comparable size. Beyond aggregate performance, Ovis2.5 demonstrates broad capability: it delivers leading results among open-source MLLMs of similar scale across STEM benchmarks and shows strong performance in grounding and video tasks. Notably, on complex chart-analysis benchmarks, Ovis2.5 sets a new state of the art for open-source models at its scale.
items.zh: 全面评估证明了Ovis2.5的卓越能力。在OpenCompass多模态排行榜（Duan等人，2025）上，Ovis2.5-9B平均得分为78.3，表明其强大的整体多模态性能。这一结果不仅相比其前身Ovis2-8B有显著提升，而且在40B参数以下的开源MLLM中建立了新的最先进水平。秉承Ovis2的“小模型，大性能”理念——特别是针对端侧应用——我们还发布了Ovis2.5-2B，在OpenCompass上得分为73.9，这是同类规模开源MLLM中的最先进结果。除了总分，Ovis2.5展示了广泛的能力：它在STEM基准测试中取得了同类开源MLLM中的领先结果，并在定位和视频任务上表现出色。值得注意的是，在复杂图表分析基准测试中，Ovis2.5在其规模的开源模型中树立了新的最先进水平。

items.en: The key advances of Ovis2.5 are summarized as follows:
items.zh: Ovis2.5的关键进展总结如下：

items.en: Native-Resolution Perception: Integrates a native-resolution vision encoder to eliminate destructive tiling, preserving the crucial details and global context needed for superior analysis of complex visuals like charts and diagrams.
items.zh: 原生分辨率感知：集成了原生分辨率视觉编码器，消除了破坏性的分块，保留了复杂视觉内容（如图表和示意图）分析所需的关键细节和全局上下文。

items.en: Deep-Reasoning Capability: Introduces an optional “thinking mode”, enabled by training on data that demonstrates reasoning with reflection, which allows the model to move beyond linear CoT for deeper and more robust solutions.
items.zh: 深度推理能力：引入了可选的“思考模式”，通过训练包含反思推理的数据实现，使模型能够超越线性CoT，获得更深层、更稳健的解决方案。

items.en: State-of-the-Art Performance: Establishes a new SOTA on the OpenCompass leaderboard for open-source MLLMs in the <40<40B class and demonstrates leading performance across STEM, chart analysis, grounding, and video benchmarks.
items.zh: 最先进性能：在OpenCompass排行榜上为40B以下类别的开源MLLM建立了新的SOTA，并在STEM、图表分析、定位和视频基准测试中展示了领先性能。

items.en: High-Efficiency Training: Features an optimized training infrastructure powered by data packing and hybrid parallelism that delivers a 33–4×4\times end-to-end speedup.
items.zh: 高效训练：采用数据打包和混合并行优化的训练基础设施，实现了33–4倍的端到端加速。

items.capEn: Figure 2: The overall architecture of Ovis2.5.

items.en: The overall architecture of Ovis2.5 is illustrated in Figure 2. Ovis2.5 retains the foundational design of the Ovis architecture (Lu et al., 2024b), comprising three core modules:
items.zh: Ovis2.5的整体架构如图2所示。Ovis2.5保留了Ovis架构（Lu等人，2024b）的基础设计，包含三个核心模块：

items.en: Visual Tokenizer (VT): A transformer-based component that extracts features from image patches. A visual head then projects each patch’s features onto a discrete vocabulary of “visual words”, producing a probability distribution over this vocabulary (i.e., a probabilistic visual token).
items.zh: 视觉分词器（VT）：一个基于Transformer的组件，从图像块中提取特征。然后，视觉头将每个块的特征投影到“视觉词”的离散词汇表上，产生该词汇表上的概率分布（即概率视觉词元）。

items.en: Visual Embedding Table (VET): Analogous to a textual embedding table in LLMs, the VET stores a dedicated embedding for each visual word, a design which alleviates structural mismatches between modalities. The final visual embedding is computed by summing the table’s embeddings, weighted by the probabilities from the VT. In other words, the embedding for a visual token is the expected value of the visual word embeddings, under the probability distribution produced by the VT.
items.zh: 视觉嵌入表（VET）：类似于LLM中的文本嵌入表，VET为每个视觉词存储专用嵌入，这种设计缓解了模态间的结构不匹配。最终的视觉嵌入通过将表的嵌入按VT产生的概率加权求和计算得到。换句话说，视觉词元的嵌入是在VT产生的概率分布下视觉词嵌入的期望值。

items.en: LLM: A pretrained open-source large language model that performs cross-modal understanding based on visual and textual embeddings to generate textual output.
items.zh: LLM：一个预训练的开源大语言模型，基于视觉和文本嵌入执行跨模态理解，生成文本输出。

items.en: To further advance Ovis2.5’s multimodal capabilities, we have incorporated the following architectural enhancements:
items.zh: 为了进一步提升Ovis2.5的多模态能力，我们加入了以下架构增强：

items.en: Native Resolution Processing: Previous versions processed images by splitting them into fixed-size sub-images, which can disrupt global structure and fine-grained details. To overcome this, Ovis2.5 replaces the standard fixed-resolution ViT with a native-resolution ViT (NaViT), enabling the direct processing of images at their native resolutions. This architecture integrates rotary position embeddings (RoPE, Su et al., 2024) into every ViT block to reinforce spatial awareness, proving especially effective for high-resolution images like complex charts. Our NaViT is initialized from the weights of siglip2-so400m-patch16-512111https://huggingface.co/google/siglip2-so400m-patch16-512 (Tschannen et al., 2025).
items.zh: 原生分辨率处理：之前的版本通过将图像分割成固定大小的子图像进行处理，这可能破坏全局结构和精细细节。为了克服这一点，Ovis2.5将标准固定分辨率ViT替换为原生分辨率ViT（NaViT），使得能够直接以原生分辨率处理图像。该架构在每个ViT块中集成了旋转位置嵌入（RoPE，Su等人，2024）以增强空间感知，对高分辨率图像（如复杂图表）尤其有效。我们的NaViT从siglip2-so400m-patch16-512（Tschannen等人，2025）的权重初始化。

items.en: Upgraded LLM: We have replaced the Qwen2.5 (Yang et al., 2024) backbone with Qwen3 (Yang et al., 2025a). This upgrade leverages the superior deep-reasoning capabilities of Qwen3 to significantly boost Ovis2.5’s performance on complex tasks and its overall multimodal proficiency.
items.zh: 升级的LLM：我们将Qwen2.5（Yang等人，2024）骨干替换为Qwen3（Yang等人，2025a）。这一升级利用了Qwen3卓越的深度推理能力，显著提升了Ovis2.5在复杂任务上的性能及其整体多模态能力。

items.en: The training pipeline for Ovis2.5 is structured into two primary stages: pre-training and post-training. The pre-training stage is subdivided into three distinct phases: Pre. Stage P1, Pre. Stage P2, and Pre. Stage P3. This is followed by a post-training stage, which contains two phases: Post. Stage P1 and Post. Stage P2. Each phase serves a distinct purpose, defined by its unique training configurations and data compositions. Table 1 provides a high-level overview of this process, and the subsequent sections will detail each stage.
items.zh: Ovis2.5的训练流程分为两个主要阶段：预训练和后训练。预训练阶段又细分为三个不同的阶段：预阶段P1、预阶段P2和预阶段P3。随后是后训练阶段，包含两个阶段：后阶段P1和后阶段P2。每个阶段都有其独特的目的，由其独特的训练配置和数据组成定义。表1提供了该过程的高层概述，后续章节将详细说明每个阶段。

items.en: The training of Ovis2.5 is underpinned by a large-scale, high-quality multimodal dataset, carefully assembled to support each phase of our training pipeline. This dataset is a curated collection, sourced from both public datasets and our in-house data. Public sources include a wide array of datasets such as COYO (Byeon et al., 2022), Laion (Schuhmann et al., 2022), Wukong (Gu et al., 2022), DataComp (Gadre et al., 2023), and SAM (Kirillov et al., 2023). To ensure data quality and diversity, we employ data processing pipelines tailored to each data type. Below, we outline several key components of the dataset.
items.zh: Ovis2.5的训练基于大规模、高质量的多模态数据集，该数据集经过精心组装，以支持训练流程的每个阶段。该数据集是一个精选集合，来源于公共数据集和我们的内部数据。公共来源包括多种数据集，如COYO (Byeon et al., 2022)、Laion (Schuhmann et al., 2022)、Wukong (Gu et al., 2022)、DataComp (Gadre et al., 2023)和SAM (Kirillov et al., 2023)。为确保数据质量和多样性，我们针对每种数据类型采用了专门的数据处理流程。下面，我们概述数据集的几个关键组成部分。

items.en: OCR Data. Recognizing that robust OCR is a cornerstone of multimodal understanding, our corpus combines established public datasets with a diverse collection of in-house and web-sourced imagery, including documents, charts, posters, and screenshots. For this collected data, an ensemble of MLLMs is used to generate annotations and synthesize question–answer pairs. A subsequent curation step then filters samples based on image resolution, language, and scene diversity to ensure a high-quality, comprehensive OCR dataset.
items.zh: OCR数据。认识到强大的OCR是多模态理解的基石，我们的语料库结合了已建立的公共数据集和多样化的内部及网络来源图像，包括文档、图表、海报和截图。对于这些收集到的数据，使用多个MLLM的集成来生成标注并合成问答对。随后的筛选步骤根据图像分辨率、语言和场景多样性过滤样本，以确保高质量、全面的OCR数据集。

items.en: Grounding Data. To equip the model with precise object localization capabilities, our grounding data is sourced from two primary sources. First, we leverage public datasets with existing bounding box annotations, such as RefCoCo (Kazemzadeh et al., 2014b), to directly synthesize grounding instructions. Second, we develop an automated pipeline where state-of-the-art detection models identify and precisely localize entities within images, after which MLLMs generate corresponding question-answer pairs, effectively scaling our high-quality grounding data.
items.zh: 定位数据。为了使模型具备精确的目标定位能力，我们的定位数据来源于两个主要来源。首先，我们利用具有现有边界框标注的公共数据集，如RefCoCo (Kazemzadeh et al., 2014b)，直接合成定位指令。其次，我们开发了一个自动化流程，其中最先进的检测模型识别并精确定位图像中的实体，然后MLLM生成相应的问答对，从而有效扩展我们的高质量定位数据。

items.en: Reasoning Data. To cultivate sophisticated reasoning, we construct a diverse reasoning dataset. First, to establish the model’s foundational reasoning ability, we assemble a large corpus of vanilla CoT data. We obtain this by collecting existing open-source CoT datasets and employing MLLMs to synthesize reasoning paths for QA pairs in our training set that originally contained only direct answers. Building on this foundation, and to encourage more complex cognition, we also use MLLMs to generate “thinking-style” data. This format, which explicitly incorporates <think>…</think> tags, is designed to teach the model advanced cognitive processes such as reflection and self-correction. Finally, to guarantee the quality of all synthesized data, we implement a cross-verification labeling strategy, where multiple MLLMs assess and select the highest-quality samples for training.
items.zh: 推理数据。为了培养复杂的推理能力，我们构建了一个多样化的推理数据集。首先，为了建立模型的基础推理能力，我们组装了一个大规模的普通思维链数据语料库。我们通过收集现有的开源思维链数据集，并使用MLLM为训练集中原本只包含直接答案的QA对合成推理路径来获得这些数据。在此基础上，为了鼓励更复杂的认知，我们还使用MLLM生成“思考风格”数据。这种格式明确包含<think>…</think>标签，旨在教授模型反思和自我纠正等高级认知过程。最后，为了保证所有合成数据的质量，我们实施了一种交叉验证标注策略，其中多个MLLM评估并选择最高质量的样本进行训练。

items.en: The pre-training process is divided into the following three phases:
items.zh: 预训练过程分为以下三个阶段：

items.en: P1: VET Pre-training. The primary goal of this phase is to train the Visual Embedding Table (VET). We utilize a dataset of image-caption pairs in a plain, non-dialogue format. To ensure stable learning, we initialize the ViT from siglip2-so400m-patch16-512 and freeze most parameters, limiting training exclusively to the final ViT layer, the visual head, and the VET. During this phase, input images are resized to a total pixel count between 448² and 896² while maintaining their original aspect ratio. Since the pre-trained ViT lacks Rotary Position Embeddings (RoPE), we employ dynamic position embedding interpolation to handle these varying resolutions, keeping RoPE itself disabled for stability.
items.zh: P1：视觉嵌入表预训练。此阶段的主要目标是训练视觉嵌入表（VET）。我们使用图像-标题对的数据集，采用简单的非对话格式。为确保稳定学习，我们从siglip2-so400m-patch16-512初始化ViT并冻结大部分参数，仅限制训练最后的ViT层、视觉头（visual head）和VET。在此阶段，输入图像被调整大小为总像素数介于448²和896²之间，同时保持原始宽高比。由于预训练的ViT缺乏旋转位置嵌入（RoPE），我们采用动态位置嵌入插值来处理这些不同的分辨率，同时保持RoPE本身禁用以确保稳定性。

items.en: P2: Multimodal Pre-training. This phase transitions to full-parameter training of all modules (VT, VET, and LLM) to establish core visual understanding and align the model with conversational formats. The training data is expanded to include conversational data from OCR, image captioning, and visual grounding tasks. Crucially, the supported resolution range is significantly expanded to a total pixel count between 448² and 1792² (approx. 200K to 3.2M pixels). To handle this increased spatial complexity, RoPE is activated in every ViT block, enhancing the model’s spatial awareness.
items.zh: P2：多模态预训练。此阶段过渡到所有模块（VT、VET和LLM）的全参数训练，以建立核心视觉理解并使模型与对话格式对齐。训练数据扩展到包括来自OCR、图像描述和视觉定位任务的对话数据。关键的是，支持的分辨率范围显著扩展到总像素数介于448²和1792²之间（约200K到3.2M像素）。为了处理这种增加的空间复杂性，在每个ViT块中激活RoPE，增强模型的空间感知能力。

items.en: P3: Multimodal Instruction Tuning. This phase continues full-parameter training, with a refined focus on enhancing the model’s ability to follow diverse multimodal instructions. To this end, the training corpus is enriched with new input types—including text-only, multi-image, and video—and expanded to cover a wide spectrum of domains, such as general QA, multilingual dialogue, OCR, chart analysis, knowledge-based QA, STEM, and medical. To foster deeper reasoning beyond linear CoT, we incorporate “thinking-style” samples annotated with Qwen3-compatible <think>…</think> tags, teaching the model to perform reflection and self-correction. The model continues to support the wide resolution range established in P2, allowing it to process high-resolution details.
items.zh: P3：多模态指令微调。此阶段继续全参数训练，重点增强模型遵循多样化多模态指令的能力。为此，训练语料库增加了新的输入类型——包括纯文本、多图像和视频——并扩展到覆盖广泛的领域，如通用问答、多语言对话、OCR、图表分析、基于知识的问答、STEM和医学。为了促进超越线性思维链的更深层次推理，我们加入了带有Qwen3兼容<think>…</think>标签的“思考风格”样本，教授模型进行反思和自我纠正。模型继续支持P2中建立的宽分辨率范围，使其能够处理高分辨率细节。

items.en: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) Data. The DPO dataset covers multimodal preference data spanning text-only, single-image, multi-image, and video modalities. It consists of two main components: (1) For reasoning-oriented tasks, we perform inference using both vanilla CoT and “thinking-style” formats and compute a verifiable score against ground-truth answers, thereby enhancing the model’s reasoning capabilities. (2) For general-purpose tasks, we leverage an MLLM-based scoring mechanism to improve the model’s performance across diverse scenarios.
items.zh: 直接偏好优化（DPO）数据。DPO数据集涵盖多模态偏好数据，包括纯文本、单图像、多图像和视频模态。它包含两个主要组成部分：（1）对于面向推理的任务，我们使用普通思维链和“思考风格”格式进行推理，并根据真实答案计算可验证分数，从而增强模型的推理能力。（2）对于通用任务，我们利用基于MLLM的评分机制来提高模型在不同场景下的性能。

items.en: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) Data. Our RLVR dataset is collected from a wide range of domains. The primary focus is on open-source mathematical problems, with additional data including science QA and visual QA tasks involving logical reasoning. We also synthesize a substantial amount of data in which more information is embedded in images rather than in text. To improve the quality of multiple-choice questions, we implement a conversion process that transforms some of these questions into a fill-in-the-blank format. This approach reduces the likelihood of correctly guessing answers without solid reasoning, a behavior that could harm training. The entire dataset undergoes both quality and offline difficulty filtering.
items.zh: 基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）数据。我们的RLVR数据集从广泛的领域收集。主要关注开源数学问题，额外数据包括涉及逻辑推理的科学问答和视觉问答任务。我们还合成了大量数据，其中更多信息嵌入在图像中而非文本中。为了提高多项选择题的质量，我们实施了一个转换过程，将其中一些问题转换为填空格式。这种方法降低了在没有扎实推理的情况下正确猜测答案的可能性，这种行为可能损害训练。整个数据集经过质量和离线难度过滤。

items.en: The post-training process comprises the following two phases:
items.zh: 后训练过程包括以下两个阶段：

items.en: P1: Multimodal DPO. In this phase, the entire Ovis2.5 model—including the vision modules and the LLM—undergoes full-parameter training. We use Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) (Rafailov et al., 2023) as the primary preference objective, augmented with an auxiliary Negative Log-Likelihood (NLL) objective to stabilize optimization. For each query, a group of candidate responses is generated using the final model checkpoint from the pre-training stage. Within this group, we then form multiple preference pairs according to their labels.
items.zh: P1：多模态DPO。在此阶段，整个Ovis2.5模型——包括视觉模块和LLM——进行全参数训练。我们使用直接偏好优化（DPO）(Rafailov et al., 2023)作为主要的偏好目标，并辅以辅助的负对数似然（NLL）目标以稳定优化。对于每个查询，使用预训练阶段的最终模型检查点生成一组候选响应。在该组中，我们根据标签形成多个偏好对。

items.en: P2: Multimodal Reinforcement Learning. This phase further improves reasoning using Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) (Shao et al., 2024) on our RLVR dataset, building on the alignment established during the DPO phase. To focus optimization on high-level cognition while preserving general capabilities, we update only the LLM parameters and keep the vision modules frozen. Under this setup, GRPO optimizes the policy on verifiable, reasoning-centric tasks without degrading the model’s overall multimodal abilities.
items.zh: P2：多模态强化学习。此阶段在DPO阶段建立的对齐基础上，使用组相对策略优化（GRPO）(Shao et al., 2024)在我们的RLVR数据集上进一步改进推理。为了将优化重点放在高级认知上，同时保留通用能力，我们仅更新LLM参数并保持视觉模块冻结。在此设置下，GRPO在可验证的、以推理为中心的任务上优化策略，而不会降低模型的整体多模态能力。

items.en: Efficiently training large multimodal models like Ovis2.5 presents significant infrastructure challenges. We focus on two primary issues: (1) computational load imbalance caused by the varying data sizes of images, videos, and text, and (2) memory limitations of our previous training framework that restrict model scale and context length. By developing targeted optimizations for both data processing and parallelism, we improve the end-to-end training speed of Ovis2.5 by 3 to 4 times.
items.zh: 高效训练像Ovis2.5这样的大型多模态模型带来了显著的基础设施挑战。我们关注两个主要问题：（1）由图像、视频和文本的不同数据大小引起的计算负载不平衡，以及（2）我们先前训练框架的内存限制，限制了模型规模和上下文长度。通过针对数据处理和并行性开发有针对性的优化，我们将Ovis2.5的端到端训练速度提高了3到4倍。

items.en: Load Balancing via Data Packing. A common inefficiency in training is padding, where samples of different lengths in a batch are padded to a uniform size. This leads to wasted computation and GPU idle time, especially with diverse multimodal data. To address this, we implement a data packing strategy. This method combines multiple shorter samples into a single, longer sequence during data preprocessing. As a result, it minimizes padding, reduces wasted computation, and creates a more balanced workload across GPUs, directly improving training throughput. Our experiments confirm that data packing significantly reduces training time while maintaining model accuracy.
items.zh: 通过数据打包实现负载均衡。训练中一个常见的低效是填充，即批次中不同长度的样本被填充到统一大小。这导致计算浪费和GPU空闲时间，尤其是在多样化的多模态数据中。为了解决这个问题，我们实施了一种数据打包策略。该方法在数据预处理过程中将多个较短的样本组合成一个更长的序列。因此，它最小化了填充，减少了计算浪费，并在GPU之间创建了更均衡的工作负载，直接提高了训练吞吐量。我们的实验证实，数据打包显著减少了训练时间，同时保持了模型准确性。

items.en: Hybrid Parallelism Framework. The increasing scale of our model architecture, particularly with the use of compute-intensive vision backbones, requires a more advanced parallelism strategy. We develop a hybrid parallelism framework for Ovis2.5 based on Megatron (Shoeybi et al., 2019). This framework combines three standard techniques: Data Parallelism (DP), Tensor Parallelism (TP), and Context Parallelism (CP). This approach effectively reduces the memory footprint for large-scale model training, leading to substantial improvements in training throughput and efficiency.
items.zh: 混合并行框架。我们模型架构的规模不断增加，特别是使用计算密集型视觉骨干网络，需要更先进的并行策略。我们基于Megatron (Shoeybi et al., 2019)为Ovis2.5开发了一个混合并行框架。该框架结合了三种标准技术：数据并行（DP）、张量并行（TP）和上下文并行（CP）。这种方法有效减少了大规模模型训练的内存占用，从而显著提高了训练吞吐量和效率。

items.en: This section presents a comprehensive evaluation of Ovis2.5. We first compare its overall multimodal performance with leading MLLMs. Subsequently, we conduct a detailed assessment of its core capabilities, including multimodal reasoning, OCR and chart, visual grounding, and video understanding. Throughout this section, we use bold to denote the best and underline for the second-best performance among open-source models of comparable scales. We use officially reported scores whenever available; otherwise, scores come from our own evaluation and are marked with an asterisk (*).
items.zh: 本节对Ovis2.5进行全面评估。我们首先将其整体多模态性能与领先的MLLM进行比较。随后，我们对其核心能力进行详细评估，包括多模态推理、OCR和图表、视觉定位以及视频理解。在本节中，我们使用粗体表示最佳，下划线表示次佳，在可比规模的开源模型中。我们尽可能使用官方报告的成绩；否则，成绩来自我们自己的评估，并用星号（*）标记。

items.en: We evaluate the overall performance of Ovis2.5 using the OpenCompass suite (Duan et al., 2025), which provides a comprehensive score by averaging results across eight key benchmarks: MMBench (Liu et al., 2024b), MMStar (Chen et al., 2024), MMMU (Yue et al., 2024a), MathVista (Lu et al., 2024a), HallusionBench (Guan et al., 2024), AI2D (Kembhavi et al., 2016), OCRBench (Liu et al., 2024d), and MMVet (Yu et al., 2023). As presented in Tables 2 and 3, with average scores of 78.3 and 73.9, respectively, Ovis2.5-9B and Ovis2.5-2B both achieve state-of-the-art performance among open-source models at their respective scales. Beyond these aggregate scores, the models demonstrate robust performance on general benchmarks such as MMBench and MMStar, and exhibit strong capabilities in several specialized domains.
items.zh: 我们使用OpenCompass套件 (Duan et al., 2025)评估Ovis2.5的整体性能，该套件通过平均八个关键基准的结果提供综合分数：MMBench (Liu et al., 2024b)、MMStar (Chen et al., 2024)、MMMU (Yue et al., 2024a)、MathVista (Lu et al., 2024a)、HallusionBench (Guan et al., 2024)、AI2D (Kembhavi et al., 2016)、OCRBench (Liu et al., 2024d)和MMVet (Yu et al., 2023)。如表2和表3所示，Ovis2.5-9B和Ovis2.5-2B的平均得分分别为78.3和73.9，在各自规模的开源模型中均达到了最先进的性能。除了这些总分，模型在通用基准（如MMBench和MMStar）上表现出稳健的性能，并在几个专业领域展现出强大的能力。

items.en: Specifically, Ovis2.5-9B excels in complex reasoning tasks, attaining 71.2 on MMMU for college-level multi-discipline problems. It also scores 87.9 on OCRBench, underscoring its precise text recognition, and 65.1 on HallusionBench, indicating fewer hallucinations and higher reliability.
items.zh: 具体来说，Ovis2.5-9B在复杂推理任务中表现出色，在MMMU（大学级多学科问题）上获得71.2分。它还在OCRBench上获得87.9分，突显其精确的文本识别能力，在HallusionBench上获得65.1分，表明幻觉更少、可靠性更高。

items.en: Collectively, these results demonstrate that Ovis2.5 not only surpasses leading open-source models like Keye-VL (Yang et al., 2025b) and GLM-4.1V (Hong et al., 2025), but also narrows the gap to frontier proprietary models such as Gemini-2.5 (et al., 2025). Complementing these cross-model comparisons, Ovis2.5 also delivers substantial gains over its predecessor, Ovis2, further validating the effectiveness of our architectural refinements and training strategy.
items.zh: 总体而言，这些结果表明 Ovis2.5 不仅超越了 Keye-VL (Yang et al., 2025b) 和 GLM-4.1V (Hong et al., 2025) 等领先的开源模型，还缩小了与 Gemini-2.5 (et al., 2025) 等前沿专有模型的差距。作为跨模型比较的补充，Ovis2.5 相比其前身 Ovis2 也取得了显著提升，进一步验证了我们架构改进和训练策略的有效性。

items.en: We evaluate the multimodal reasoning capabilities of Ovis2.5 on a comprehensive suite of benchmarks—MMMU, MMMU-Pro (Yue et al., 2024b), MathVista, MathVerse (Zhang et al., 2024), MathVision (Wang et al., 2024), LogicVista (Xiao et al., 2024), WeMath (Qiao et al., 2024), and DynaMath (Zou et al., 2024)—covering interdisciplinary academic reasoning, visual mathematics, logical reasoning, and dynamic problem solving.
items.zh: 我们在全面的基准测试套件上评估了 Ovis2.5 的多模态推理能力，包括 MMMU、MMMU-Pro (Yue et al., 2024b)、MathVista、MathVerse (Zhang et al., 2024)、MathVision (Wang et al., 2024)、LogicVista (Xiao et al., 2024)、WeMath (Qiao et al., 2024) 和 DynaMath (Zou et al., 2024)，涵盖跨学科学术推理、视觉数学、逻辑推理和动态问题求解。

items.en: As detailed in Table 4 and Table 5, Ovis2.5 excels across reasoning domains. Specifically, Ovis2.5-9B showcases leading capabilities in visual and structured mathematics among open-source models. It achieves the top rank on both MathVista and WeMath, demonstrating its exceptional strength in visual-compositional and concept-integration tasks. Its dominance is further solidified by consistently ranking among the top two on all other math-focused benchmarks, including MathVerse, MathVision, LogicVista, and DynaMath. Beyond its mathematical prowess, the model’s proficiency in general academic reasoning is confirmed by strong scores of 71.2 on MMMU and 54.4 on the more challenging MMMU-Pro benchmark. Notably, the compact Ovis2.5-2B delivers state-of-the-art results within its size category, achieving substantial gains over comparable open-source models across both general reasoning and math-oriented tasks.
items.zh: 如表 4 和表 5 所示，Ovis2.5 在推理领域表现出色。具体而言，Ovis2.5-9B 在开源模型中展示了领先的视觉和结构化数学能力。它在 MathVista 和 WeMath 上均排名第一，证明了其在视觉组合和概念整合任务中的卓越实力。其主导地位进一步巩固，在所有其他数学基准测试（包括 MathVerse、MathVision、LogicVista 和 DynaMath）中始终排名前二。除了数学能力，该模型在通用学术推理方面的熟练程度也得到了确认，在 MMMU 上获得 71.2 分，在更具挑战性的 MMMU-Pro 基准测试上获得 54.4 分。值得注意的是，紧凑型 Ovis2.5-2B 在其尺寸类别中取得了最先进的结果，在通用推理和数学导向任务上均比同类开源模型有显著提升。

items.en: The challenge of interpreting visual data, such as documents and charts, demands a sophisticated cascade of skills from MLLMs, spanning from low-level OCR to high-level semantic reasoning. To rigorously evaluate these capabilities, we assess Ovis2.5 on a suite of challenging benchmarks.
items.zh: 解释文档和图表等视觉数据的挑战，要求多模态大语言模型具备从低级 OCR 到高级语义推理的复杂技能级联。为了严格评估这些能力，我们在具有挑战性的基准测试套件上评估了 Ovis2.5。

items.en: On the large-scale, bilingual OCRBench v2 (Fu et al., 2024a), Ovis2.5 not only surpasses all leading open-source competitors but also outperforms the proprietary GPT-4o model. This state-of-the-art performance extends to complex chart analysis. We test our model on the newly introduced ChartQA Pro (Masry et al., 2025), which features a diverse range of visualizations from conventional charts to complex infographics. Across these and other established benchmarks—including ChartQA (Masry et al., 2022), DocVQA (Mathew et al., 2021), and TextVQA (Singh et al., 2019)—our Ovis2.5-9B consistently demonstrates superior performance, attaining the top average score against its open-source peers, as detailed in Table 6.
items.zh: 在大规模双语 OCRBench v2 (Fu et al., 2024a) 上，Ovis2.5 不仅超越了所有领先的开源竞争对手，还优于专有模型 GPT-4o。这一最先进的性能扩展到了复杂的图表分析。我们在新推出的 ChartQA Pro (Masry et al., 2025) 上测试了我们的模型，该基准测试包含从传统图表到复杂信息图的各种可视化。在这些基准测试以及其他已建立的基准测试（包括 ChartQA (Masry et al., 2022)、DocVQA (Mathew et al., 2021) 和 TextVQA (Singh et al., 2019)）中，我们的 Ovis2.5-9B 始终表现出卓越的性能，在开源同行中获得了最高的平均分数，详见表 6。

items.en: Visual grounding, the task of precisely localizing objects from natural language descriptions, is a cornerstone of advanced spatial reasoning in MLLMs. We benchmarked Ovis2.5 on the standard referring expression datasets: RefCOCO (Kazemzadeh et al., 2014a), RefCOCO+, and RefCOCOg (Mao et al., 2016). As detailed in Table 7, Ovis2.5 achieves a state-of-the-art average score of 90.1 among compared open-source models.
items.zh: 视觉定位，即根据自然语言描述精确定位物体的任务，是多模态大语言模型中高级空间推理的基石。我们在标准指代表达数据集上对 Ovis2.5 进行了基准测试：RefCOCO (Kazemzadeh et al., 2014a)、RefCOCO+ 和 RefCOCOg (Mao et al., 2016)。如表 7 所示，Ovis2.5 在比较的开源模型中取得了 90.1 的最先进平均分数。

items.en: This leading performance is consistent across individual benchmarks. The model delivers top-tier results across nearly all splits of RefCOCO and RefCOCO+, frequently ranking first or second. Crucially, Ovis2.5 demonstrates a pronounced advantage on the more demanding RefCOCOg dataset—a benchmark known for complex descriptions of non-salient objects. Here, it outperforms all competitors on both the validation and test sets. This exceptional performance, particularly on RefCOCOg, showcases the model’s advanced understanding of visual-linguistic connections, proving its effectiveness for visual grounding tasks.
items.zh: 这一领先性能在各个基准测试中保持一致。该模型在 RefCOCO 和 RefCOCO+ 的几乎所有子集上都取得了顶级结果，经常排名第一或第二。关键的是，Ovis2.5 在要求更高的 RefCOCOg 数据集上表现出明显优势——该基准测试以非显著物体的复杂描述而闻名。在这里，它在验证集和测试集上都优于所有竞争对手。这种卓越的性能，尤其是在 RefCOCOg 上，展示了该模型对视觉-语言连接的先进理解，证明了其在视觉定位任务中的有效性。

items.en: Ovis2.5’s proficiency extends to understanding complex multi-modal sequences, which we evaluated on a comprehensive suite of multi-image and video benchmarks. In the multi-image domain, the model’s superior cross-image reasoning is evident. On benchmarks like BLINK (Fu et al., 2024b) and MMT-Bench (Ying et al., 2024), it achieves impressive scores of 67.3 and 69.3 respectively, outperforming other prominent models.
items.zh: Ovis2.5 的能力还扩展到理解复杂的多模态序列，我们在全面的多图像和视频基准测试套件上对其进行了评估。在多图像领域，该模型卓越的跨图像推理能力显而易见。在 BLINK (Fu et al., 2024b) 和 MMT-Bench (Ying et al., 2024) 等基准测试上，它分别取得了 67.3 和 69.3 的令人印象深刻的分数，优于其他著名模型。

items.en: This advantage carries over into video understanding. On a diverse set of video benchmarks—including VideoMME (Fu et al., 2025), MVBench (Li et al., 2024), MLVU (Zhou et al., 2024), and TempCompass (Liu et al., 2024c)—Ovis2.5 maintains a strong and consistent performance across a broader range of tasks. Taken together, these results underscore the model’s advanced ability to capture and reason over both spatial and temporal dynamics, establishing its strong competitiveness in sequence-level multimodal understanding.
items.zh: 这一优势延续到了视频理解领域。在多样化的视频基准测试集上——包括 VideoMME (Fu et al., 2025)、MVBench (Li et al., 2024)、MLVU (Zhou et al., 2024) 和 TempCompass (Liu et al., 2024c)——Ovis2.5 在更广泛的任务中保持了强劲且一致的性能。综合来看，这些结果强调了该模型在捕捉和推理空间与时间动态方面的先进能力，确立了其在序列级多模态理解中的强大竞争力。

items.en: In this report, we present Ovis2.5. Building upon the foundational architecture of the Ovis series, this version introduces significant advances in both visual perception and multimodal reasoning. On the perception side, we integrate a NaViT to process images at their native, variable resolutions, preserving both fine details and global structure that are essential for visually dense content such as charts. On the reasoning side, we introduce an advanced “thinking mode” paradigm. This capability, cultivated through training on reflection-oriented data, enables the model to perform self-correction and revision on complex tasks, offering a controllable trade-off between latency and accuracy at inference time. Evaluated on a wide spectrum of challenging benchmarks, Ovis2.5 establishes a new state-of-the-art on OpenCompass for its parameter class and delivers leading results across domains including STEM, OCR and chart, visual grounding, and multi-image/video comprehension.
items.zh: 在本报告中，我们介绍了 Ovis2.5。在 Ovis 系列基础架构之上，本版本在视觉感知和多模态推理方面引入了重大进展。在感知方面，我们集成了 NaViT，以原始可变分辨率处理图像，保留了对图表等视觉密集内容至关重要的精细细节和全局结构。在推理方面，我们引入了一种先进的“思考模式”范式。这种能力通过基于反思数据的训练培养，使模型能够在复杂任务上进行自我修正和修订，在推理时提供延迟和准确性之间的可控权衡。在广泛具有挑战性的基准测试上评估，Ovis2.5 在其参数类别中为 OpenCompass 建立了新的最先进水平，并在 STEM、OCR 和图表、视觉定位以及多图像/视频理解等领域取得了领先结果。

items.en: Despite these gains, several promising avenues remain: (i) scaling perception to 4K-level high-resolution images while maintaining accuracy; (ii) handling long-input video with richer temporal reasoning; and (iii) tighter integration of tool use for action-augmented reasoning. We look forward to exploring these directions in our future work.
items.zh: 尽管取得了这些进展，仍有几个有前景的方向值得探索：(i) 将感知扩展到 4K 级高分辨率图像，同时保持准确性；(ii) 处理具有更丰富时间推理的长输入视频；(iii) 更紧密地集成工具使用以实现动作增强推理。我们期待在未来的工作中探索这些方向。

items.en: Shiyin Lu, Yang Li, Yu Xia, Yuwei Hu, Shanshan Zhao, Yanqing Ma, Zhichao Wei, Yinglun Li, Lunhao Duan
